verdicts.action: Fix critical bugs: widget date rollover, reminders in power saving mode, saving loop, and holiday dates.
evidence: "widget calendar date not automatically rolling over to next day" - Wazza R
"Location reminders don't work in medium power saving mode" - Ankit Mehta
"sometimes it won't save,will just have a loading loop" - m pe
"a few Singapore holiday was on the wrong date.ie Hari Raya Puasa was on 5/6 but calendar show 4/6. Deepavali 27/10 was show wrongly on 26/10" - David Tan
verdicts.comment: Direct complaints in reviews for each bug category.

verdicts.action: Rethink premium pricing: consider lower price points, PPP adjustments, or ad-supported free features.
evidence: "No reminders in free version" - Vishal Sharma
"pro version is very costly" - Vishal Sharma
"all the good feature are in premium" - leishaa k
"Very expensive for a simple app, and quite useless without buying the premium." - Cretinous Martyr
"free version only gives you three total lists" - Chris Bryant
verdicts.comment: Multiple users complain about cost and limitations of free version.

verdicts.action: Simplify UI by reducing clutter, ensuring tasks are visible, and improving onboarding.
evidence: "very complicated/cumbersome UI. You have multiple places where the tasks can get hidden & then you'll forget" - Saptarshi Ghosh
"no task information on screen" - jayesh patel
"This app is to complicated" - alan varghese

verdicts.action: Add requested features: history view for medication tracking, hide completed habits, web version, Arabic language support.
evidence: "there was no way to go and see which days I checked it or not" - B (related to history view)
"would like option for completed habits to hide for the day" - Nick Pcp (hide completed)
"Why not find Arabic language" - ccvcx chcvch (Arabic support)
No evidence for web version or medication tracking specifically.
verdicts.comment: Some features requested, but not all are directly mentioned; web version and medication tracking not found.

verdicts.action: Restore previously free features or clearly communicate premium vs free limitations.
evidence: "Now, those trees are locked behind a "premium" wall... they're charging you for content they offered for free before." - Summer Barber
"I am not able to open other spieces of trees. It says upgrade to Pro version..." - Sree Chakrika
verdicts.comment: Users upset that previously free features are now premium.

summary: Most recommendations are directly supported by user complaints, except the feature request for a web version and medication tracking history which lack evidence.
